title: oxydectes fulva
intro: Oxydectes fulva, also known as the Red False Dragon's Blood plant, is a flowering plant species in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Oxydectes fulva include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in herbal remedies, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
